title: Covanalyze Output Schema
description: JSON Schema for covanalyze coverage analysis tool output. Supports both basic coverage-only mode and enriched mode with AST data.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema file

file_reports.description: Array of file coverage reports, sorted by coverage_rate descending

UncoveredItem.description: Represents a single uncovered code segment with optional AST enrichment data

function.description: Name of the function containing this uncovered code. Truncated at 256 characters with '...' suffix if longer. Optional field populated during AST enrichment.

type.description: Type of uncovered code segment. Valid values: 'branch' (conditional branch), 'error_path' (error handling path), 'early_return' (early return statement), 'loop' (loop body), or empty string when type cannot be determined. Optional field populated during AST enrichment.

condition.description: The condition expression for branches or loops. Truncated at 512 characters with '...' suffix if longer. Uses empty string when unavailable. Optional field populated during AST enrichment.

line_range.description: Line range of uncovered code in format 'start' or 'start-end'. Single line format: '45'. Multi-line format: '45-52'. Start line must be > 0, end line must be >= start line.

FileReport.description: Represents coverage analysis results for a single file

file.description: File path exactly as it appears in coverage.out, relative to project root. No path normalization applied.

coverage_rate.description: Coverage rate for this file, rounded to 4 decimal places (e.g., 0.7845). Set to 1.0 for files with 0 statements.

uncovered_items.description: Array of uncovered code segments, sorted by line number ascending. Empty array for files with 100% coverage.
